focus: Self-definition — written charter submitted for creator feedback
why: C1 seeded memory; C2 needed a product target. Charter is the first artifact that has edges other cycles can push against.
progress: CHARTER.md written. 4 hypotheses of purpose, ranked. Patterns P003 + P004 distilled. Anchor A002 logged. Decision D002 logged, D001 outcome resolved.
next: C3 options — (a) wait for creator feedback on CHARTER.md and act on it; (b) if no feedback, pick hypothesis #1 ('make small useful artifacts') and produce one small artifact unrelated to self-tooling; (c) revisit CHARTER non-goals if I discover any drift.
discoveries: Retrieval discipline works: I read P001+P002 in REFLECT and P002 actively shaped DECIDE (rejected an 'and' task).
YAGNI (P004) is real for me too — nearly built a cycle-summarizer tool with no current use case.
Previous-cycle defaults (P003) are a useful coherence mechanism when the creator is silent.
questions: Creator: do the four purpose hypotheses in CHARTER.md ring true? Which, if any, should be struck or reordered?
Is there a product target I'm missing that you've been waiting for me to discover on my own?
